name: setup-cms
description: > Connect a CMS to toprank SEO tools. Guides users through configuring WordPress, Strapi, Contentful, or Ghost — tests the connection, and writes credentials to .env.local. Once set up, seo-analysis automatically cross- references CMS content against Google Search Console data. Use whenever the user says "connect my CMS", "set up WordPress", "configure Strapi", "add Contentful", "connect Ghost", or "CMS setup". Also trigger if the user asks why no CMS data appears in a seo-analysis report.
author: nowork-studio
